title: Create Sky
description: Build Create factories from scratch in skyblock.
body:
## Gameplay

- Start in the void, with nothing but a tree, dirt and items for a cobblestone generator.
- Obtain new resources through composting and sifting.
- Expand your island and automate resources.

Gameplay is mostly based around
[Fabricae Ex Nihilo](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabricae-ex-nihilo)
in the early game and
[Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-fabric)
in the later game.
Utility and performance mods are added.

## Tips and tricks
- Inventories can be sorted via middle mouse click
- Scrolling over an item moves it between inventories
- F7 opens a menu, which allows you to activate an overlay that shows spawnable areas


## Current issues

- Progressing to brass is currently not possible.
